content.text: Let me check the current cluster state for this stage.

input.command:
echo "=== JOB ===" && kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o wide 2>&1
echo "=== PODS ===" && kubectl get pods -n spark-pi 2>&1
echo "=== ROLE ===" && kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1
echo "=== SA ===" && kubectl get sa -n spark-pi 2>&1
echo "=== JOB SPEC ==="
kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}{"\n"}{.spec.template.spec.serviceAccountName}{"\n"}{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources}{"\n"}' 2>&1
echo
kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].command}' 2>&1
echo

content.text: Role is intact with `pods`. Now fix the job — image 3.5.4, SA, memory — and reapply.

input.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.4
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.4.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never

content.content: File created successfully at: /workspace/spark-pi-job.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.4
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.4.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never

input.command:
kubectl delete job spark-pi -n spark-pi
kubectl apply -f /workspace/spark-pi-job.yaml
